scripts.test:coverage: SOCIALCALC_COVERAGE=1 vp build && SOCIALCALC_COVERAGE=1 vp test --coverage
scripts.test:bun: SOCIALCALC_COVERAGE_ISTANBUL=1 vp build && SOCIALCALC_COVERAGE_ISTANBUL=1 bun test ./test --isolate --parallel=4
scripts.verify:dafny:regen: lsc regen --backend=dafny lemma/a1.ts && lsc regen --backend=dafny lemma/eval-ops.ts && lsc regen --backend=dafny lemma/lookup-result.ts
scripts.verify:lean:gen: lsc gen --backend=lean lemma/a1.ts && lsc gen --backend=lean lemma/eval-ops.ts && lsc gen --backend=lean lemma/lookup-result.ts
scripts.verify:lean: vp run verify:lean:gen && test -s lemma/a1.types.lean && test -s lemma/a1.def.lean && test -s lemma/a1.proof.lean && test -s lemma/eval-ops.types.lean && test -s lemma/eval-ops.def.lean && test -s lemma/eval-ops.proof.lean && test -s lemma/lookup-result.types.lean && test -s lemma/lookup-result.def.lean && test -s lemma/lookup-result.proof.lean
scripts.verify:both: vp run verify:dafny && vp run verify:lean
scripts.test:coverage:merged: rm -rf coverage-browser-v8 coverage-merged && SOCIALCALC_COVERAGE=1 vp build --minify && SOCIALCALC_COVERAGE=1 vp test --coverage && SOCIALCALC_BROWSER_COVERAGE_TEST=1 vp test test/browser-coverage-mapping.test.ts test/merge-browser-coverage-guard.test.ts --run && SOCIALCALC_BROWSER_COVERAGE=1 vp exec playwright test && node scripts/merge-browser-coverage.mjs
